commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 27:15 The twelfth captain for the twelfth month was Heldai the Netophathite, of Othniel: and in his division were twenty and four thousand. Douay Rheims 1609 Moreover David was clothed with a robe of fine linen, and all the Levites that carried the Ark, and the singing men, and Chonenias the prince of prophecy among the singers: and David also was clothed with an (a) Ephod of linen. (a) Another linen garment used by Prophets, such as Samuel did wear being a child 1.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Holdai, called Heled, the son of Baana, chap. xi. 30., and 2 Kings xxiii. 29.
Gothoniel. So the Septuagint write Othoniel, (Haydock) so famous in the book of Judges, i. 13., and iii. 9.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
